apiKey.title: CodePunch API key
apiKey.description: Your CodePunch API key. This is used only to obtain an access token.

apiSecret.title: CodePunch API secret
apiSecret.description: Your CodePunch API secret. This is used only to obtain an access token.

date.title: Date
date.description: Select the reference date. The actor converts it to the yyyymmdd format required by the CodePunch v2 API.

dateComparison.title: Date comparison
dateComparison.description: Comparison operator applied to the date filter.

keywords.title: Keywords
keywords.description: Keywords to search for. Values are joined with the CodePunch pipe syntax. If a keyword does not include %, the actor wraps it as %keyword%.

tlds.title: TLDs
tlds.description: Optional TLD allow-list. Values are lowercased, deduplicated, and joined with commas before calling CodePunch.

enhancedAnalysisEnabled.title: Enhanced analysis
enhancedAnalysisEnabled.description: Optionally fetch the homepage content for each matching domain and ask an LLM to summarize what appears there.

openRouterApiKey.title: OpenRouter API key
openRouterApiKey.description: Required only when Enhanced analysis is enabled.

openRouterModel.title: OpenRouter model
openRouterModel.description: Required only when Enhanced analysis is enabled. Default: deepseek/deepseek-v3.2

sortField.title: Sort field
sortField.description: Optional sort field passed through to the upstream API.

sortOrder.title: Sort order
sortOrder.description: Optional sort order passed through to the upstream API.

totalLimit.title: Total limit
totalLimit.description: Maximum number of matching domains to emit across all paginated requests.
